flashcards.exportTSVDesc: Generates a .tsv file + media folder. Import into Anki manually.
flashcards.exportAPKGDesc: Single .apkg file with everything included. Just double-click to import.
flashcards.cpuCoresNote: At least 1 core stays free for the system. More cores = faster generation.
flashcards.noMediaLoaded: Load a media file to enable audio/video extraction
flashcards.mediaTypeVideo: Video detected — audio clips, screenshots and video clips available
flashcards.mediaTypeAudio: Audio detected — only audio clips available
flashcards.comingSoonDesc: Create Anki flashcards automatically from your subtitles. Perfect for language learning with movies and TV shows.
settings.modelsHint: Click a model to quick-add an API key with this model as default
shortcuts.overlay.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.overlay.hint: Press Shift+? to toggle this panel
